untranslatable_reason: Broadening Bottom requires trend line slope analysis across multiple swing points (diverging top and bottom lines). This requires custom multi-bar trend identification logic that cannot be expressed through point-in-time indicator comparisons. The pattern fundamentally depends on geometric slope calculations across at least 4 price extrema, which exceeds the scope of available indicator-based conditions. Approximated entry with volatility expansion (outside bars, wide range, volume) and price position extremes as proxy signals.
